name: Dilly Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion in butter until lightly golden.
2. Remove mixture from heat and stir in cottage cheese.
3. Stir yeast into warm water until dissolved.
4. In a large bowl, combine sugar, dill seeds, salt, baking soda, and egg. Gradually add the flour.
5. Add the yeast-water mixture to the dry ingredients.
6. Gently fold in the onion-butter-cottage cheese mixture.
7. Pour the dough into a greased loaf pan and cover with plastic wrap.
8. Let rise until doubled in size, about 1 hour.
9. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
10. Bake for 34-50 minutes or until golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the side.
